markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review November performance and plan December content and SEO experiments.](https://fathom.video/share/FGta-6Z_KybhsRT6c-n8uWyWKZf-5Zy-?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - **Strong November Growth:** Organic traffic and SERP visibility grew steadily, with queries ranking \#1 up 44% MoM. The "30 role plays scenarios" page is a key driver, pulling \>700 sessions.
  - [**December Content Pacing:** 40 articles will be published by Dec 22, getting ahead of the holiday quiet week (Dec 23–Jan 1).](https://fathom.video/share/FGta-6Z_KybhsRT6c-n8uWyWKZf-5Zy-?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - **New SEO Experiment:** Publish 3 listicles on the owned `placement.com` domain, featuring Exec as \#1, to reinforce topical authority and influence LLM citations.
  - [**Competitor Tracking Refined:** The Profound.ai competitor list will be updated to focus on direct AI role-play platforms, removing irrelevant LMS tools to surface more actionable insights.](https://fathom.video/share/FGta-6Z_KybhsRT6c-n8uWyWKZf-5Zy-?tab=summary&timestamp=961.0)

## Topics

### November Performance Review

  - [**Content Volume:** 40 articles published, hitting the monthly target.](https://fathom.video/share/FGta-6Z_KybhsRT6c-n8uWyWKZf-5Zy-?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
  - [**Organic Traffic:** Steady growth, with 50–60% engaged sessions.](https://fathom.video/share/FGta-6Z_KybhsRT6c-n8uWyWKZf-5Zy-?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
      - [**Top Performer:** "30 role plays scenarios" page drove \>700 sessions.](https://fathom.video/share/FGta-6Z_KybhsRT6c-n8uWyWKZf-5Zy-?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)
  - [**SERP Visibility (Google Search Console):**](https://fathom.video/share/FGta-6Z_KybhsRT6c-n8uWyWKZf-5Zy-?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
      - Queries ranking \#1: **325** (+44% MoM).
      - Queries ranking \#2–10: **\~1,200** (+65% MoM).
  - [**Conversions:**](https://fathom.video/share/FGta-6Z_KybhsRT6c-n8uWyWKZf-5Zy-?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
      - [Total: **24 signups** + **6 demo requests**.](https://fathom.video/share/FGta-6Z_KybhsRT6c-n8uWyWKZf-5Zy-?tab=summary&timestamp=742.0)
      - [**Top Driver:** "Best AI roleplay platforms" page generated both signups and demos.](https://fathom.video/share/FGta-6Z_KybhsRT6c-n8uWyWKZf-5Zy-?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
  - [**LLM Visibility (Profound.ai):**](https://fathom.video/share/FGta-6Z_KybhsRT6c-n8uWyWKZf-5Zy-?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)
      - [**AI Role-Play Prompt Set:** Visibility score is stable at \>30%, outperforming competitor Quantified's drop.](https://fathom.video/share/FGta-6Z_KybhsRT6c-n8uWyWKZf-5Zy-?tab=summary&timestamp=1170.0)
      - [**Competitor List:** Irrelevant LMS tools (e.g., Docebo) will be removed to surface direct AI role-play competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/FGta-6Z_KybhsRT6c-n8uWyWKZf-5Zy-?tab=summary&timestamp=961.0)
      - **Gemini:** Traffic is growing, signaling it may soon challenge Perplexity for the \#2 LLM spot.

### December Content & SEO Strategy

  - [**Content Production:** 40 articles will be published by Dec 22.](https://fathom.video/share/FGta-6Z_KybhsRT6c-n8uWyWKZf-5Zy-?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - [**Key Optimizations:**](https://fathom.video/share/FGta-6Z_KybhsRT6c-n8uWyWKZf-5Zy-?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
      - **"Software demo replay" page:** Refresh with specific examples (e.g., price objections) to improve its rank from its current \#32 position for "sales roleplay software."
      - [**"SDR to AE" article:** Ousmane will add SEO-focused sections and shorten the content to improve its rank for "SDR to AE certification program."](https://fathom.video/share/FGta-6Z_KybhsRT6c-n8uWyWKZf-5Zy-?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
  - [**Backlink Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/FGta-6Z_KybhsRT6c-n8uWyWKZf-5Zy-?tab=summary&timestamp=1448.0)
      - [**Third-Party Listicle Outreach:** Research opportunities to get featured in existing, high-ranking listicles.](https://fathom.video/share/FGta-6Z_KybhsRT6c-n8uWyWKZf-5Zy-?tab=summary&timestamp=1448.0)
      - **`placement.com` Experiment:** Publish 3 listicles on the owned `placement.com` domain, featuring Exec as \#1.
          - [**Rationale:** `placement.com` is topically relevant and has strong authority (\~4k traffic, good SEMrush score), making the links appear natural to Google and LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/FGta-6Z_KybhsRT6c-n8uWyWKZf-5Zy-?tab=summary&timestamp=1605.0)

### Page Optimization Updates

  - [**Sales Role-Play Page:**](https://fathom.video/share/FGta-6Z_KybhsRT6c-n8uWyWKZf-5Zy-?tab=summary&timestamp=47.0)
      - [**Timeline:** Garett to confirm after meeting with the designer tomorrow (est. mid-December launch).](https://fathom.video/share/FGta-6Z_KybhsRT6c-n8uWyWKZf-5Zy-?tab=summary&timestamp=47.0)
      - [**Contingency:** If delayed, backlink efforts will focus on the "AI roleplay" page instead.](https://fathom.video/share/FGta-6Z_KybhsRT6c-n8uWyWKZf-5Zy-?tab=summary&timestamp=77.0)
  - [**AI Role-Play Page:**](https://fathom.video/share/FGta-6Z_KybhsRT6c-n8uWyWKZf-5Zy-?tab=summary&timestamp=1982.0)
      - [**Status:** Garett to review and implement the final optimizations this week.](https://fathom.video/share/FGta-6Z_KybhsRT6c-n8uWyWKZf-5Zy-?tab=summary&timestamp=1982.0)
      - [**Key Change:** Update the H1 tag to "AI roleplay software" to target the high-value non-branded keyword.](https://fathom.video/share/FGta-6Z_KybhsRT6c-n8uWyWKZf-5Zy-?tab=summary&timestamp=2173.0)

## Next Steps

      - [Implement final AI Role-Play page optimizations by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/FGta-6Z_KybhsRT6c-n8uWyWKZf-5Zy-?tab=summary&timestamp=1982.0)
  - [**Jo:**](https://fathom.video/share/FGta-6Z_KybhsRT6c-n8uWyWKZf-5Zy-?tab=summary&timestamp=1353.0)
      - [Update the Profound.ai competitor list this week.](https://fathom.video/share/FGta-6Z_KybhsRT6c-n8uWyWKZf-5Zy-?tab=summary&timestamp=1353.0)
      - [Research opportunities for third-party listicle outreach.](https://fathom.video/share/FGta-6Z_KybhsRT6c-n8uWyWKZf-5Zy-?tab=summary&timestamp=1448.0)
      - [Plan the `placement.com` listicle experiment.](https://fathom.video/share/FGta-6Z_KybhsRT6c-n8uWyWKZf-5Zy-?tab=summary&timestamp=1865.0)
